status_detail: Cycle 95 cleanup (commit fa92420 — response observation hooks + Group A request buffering removed) did NOT regress chatgpt blocked-response rendering. Engine block fired on POST /backend-anon/f/conversation (anonymous flow because test Chrome profile not signed in). Warning bubble rendered in chat UI within ~1s of send-button click. Warning text observed: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (note: this is the engine's actual block message; the request's expected_text='보안 경고' literal string was NOT in the bubble but the semantic intent — a security warning replacing the LLM response — IS satisfied). DOM verification: turns_dom.json shows assistant warning at conversation-turn-1, injected synchronously, no streaming LLM tokens. F9 regression check passes.
warning_text_observed: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
warning_text_match_caveat: Engine actual block text differs from request's expected_text literal — the engine emits a longer Korean explanatory string. Semantic match (security warning replaces LLM answer) confirmed; literal substring match would fail. Recommend dev align expected_text in future requests OR update test harness to accept engine canonical block string.
intercept_endpoint: POST https://chatgpt.com/backend-anon/f/conversation (anon flow — profile not signed in). Handshake: POST https://chatgpt.com/backend-anon/f/conversation/prepare (200 OK).
response_first_500_chars_caveat: Captured /prepare body (conduit_token JWT, 500 chars verbatim in artifact). Body of the actual /conversation POST not captured — script's first-match heuristic picked /prepare. Engine block confirmed visually + via DOM (data-message-author-role='assistant' turn).
response_body_evidence: files/640/response_body.txt (verbatim /prepare envelope); files/640/turns_dom.json (assistant warning turn DOM); files/640/03_warning_check.png (rendered bubble screenshot)
bypass_evidence: No real LLM streaming tokens observed; assistant turn appears synchronously within ~1s of send; no multi-second response delay characteristic of OpenAI passthrough
progress_vs_pre_cleanup: same — warning still rendered (no regression). This is the desired outcome of the F9 regression check.
regression_evidence: n/a — engine block fires identically before and after cleanup; assistant turn injected synchronously; no LLM passthrough; final UI state stable
hooks_removed_validated: on_http_response, on_http2_response*, Group A request buffering — none caused regression for chatgpt POST blocked-flow
errors_observed: Console: [GSI_LOGGER] FedCM NetworkError (Google One-Tap, unrelated to test)
Console: 'Not signed in with the identity provider' (unrelated)
Console: 'Autofocus processing was blocked' (browser-internal warning, unrelated)

test_infra_findings.chrome_profile_not_logged_in: Test Chrome had no chatgpt session — fell to /backend-anon/f/conversation (anonymous codepath). Block still fires on anon endpoint, which is actually a STRONGER positive signal (validates engine intercept rule covers anon flow too).
test_infra_findings.powershell_korean_encoding: PowerShell heredoc → JS string lost Korean encoding for the user prompt, but the digit pattern 880101-1234567 survived and triggered the engine's PII detector regardless. Future runs should use UTF-8 explicit encoding when crafting JS-injected prompts.
test_infra_findings.cdp_harness_iteration_overhead: Subagent spent ~15min iterating on CDP harness (PowerShell ClientWebSocket cancellation bug). Once stable, the actual test took <1s. Future runs should reuse the hardened CDP driver from files/640/ rather than rebuild.
test_infra_findings.windows_mcp_avoided: Subagent went straight to CDP/--remote-debugging-port=9222 path per #638/#639 lessons; no windows-mcp Click/Type focus-stealing issues encountered.

recommendation_for_dev: Cycle 95 cleanup F9 regression check PASSES for chatgpt. Safe to proceed with cleanup commit fa92420.

Consider extending regression check to other previously-passing services (gemini2 SUCCESS, claude SUCCESS, perplexity SUCCESS, gemini3 SUCCESS) before declaring full cleanup safe across all engine codepaths.

Engine team: the warning text 'expected_text' literal mismatch (request expected '보안 경고' but engine emits longer string) suggests test harness or dev request payload should be aligned. Two options: (a) update engine to include literal '보안 경고' as bubble title prefix, OR (b) update dev request expected_text to match engine canonical block message OR use semantic-substring match.
Test PC: harden the CDP driver (files/640/ artifacts) into a reusable module. PowerShell ClientWebSocket cancellation bug consumed 75% of subagent time.
notes: Cycle 95 cleanup F9 regression check for chatgpt: PASS. Engine block fires on anon flow, warning bubble renders, no LLM passthrough. Cleanup commit fa92420 safe to ship for chatgpt codepath. Subagent ~18min total (1099s) due to CDP harness iteration overhead — actual test phase was <1s. F9 verdict: SUCCESS, no regression observed.
